module imports - test dagster_sphinx and its exports can be imported

p2p_enrichment.notes: The repo uses Makefile with ruff, pyright, and other quality checks. Pyright requires a special venv setup that is not available in the Docker image. The dagster-sphinx extension does not have its own pytest tests. Added basic p2p gates for module imports and syntax checking to ensure the code is valid both before and after the fix.

validate.notes: Fixed test.sh location (moved to tests/) and path (changed /workspace/task/tests to /tests). All 4 checks passed: Docker build, NOP test (reward=0 - tests fail on buggy code), Gold test (reward=1 - all 8 tests pass after fix), Rubric judge (ICR=1.0).
